## Hardware

- **Device:** (e.g., Raspberry Pi 5 8GB, Zimaboard 832, Proxmox VM)
- **WAN interface:** (e.g., built-in ethernet, USB adapter model)
- **LAN interface:** (e.g., native ethernet, USB adapter model)

## Software

- **OpenWrt version:**
- **AmneziaWG package version:**
- **Deployment option:** (A: Dedicated hardware / B: VM / C: Docker)

## VPN Provider

- **Provider:** (e.g., Mullvad, IVPN, ProtonVPN)
- **Protocol:** (WireGuard / AmneziaWG)
- **Server location:**

## Results

- **Setup difficulty:** (Easy / Moderate / Difficult)
- **Modifications needed:** (any changes from the default guides?)
- **Performance:** (approximate speeds, latency)

## Issues Encountered

<!-- Any problems and how you solved them. This helps others with the same hardware. -->
